## Related Issues / ADRs
<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Implements ADR-0007 -->

## Checklist
- [ ] My branch follows the naming convention (`type/short-description`)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I have added or updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I have **not** committed any secrets, credentials, PII, or PHI
- [ ] I have requested review from the appropriate CODEOWNERS
- [ ] If this introduces a significant architectural change, I have authored an ADR in `docs/decisions/`

<!-- New attack surface? New data flows? New external dependencies? Note any threat-model impact. -->
